title: Login page not loading
description: Users are experiencing issues accessing the login page. The page shows a blank screen instead of the login form.

title: Payment gateway timeout
description: Customers reporting timeout errors when trying to complete payment transactions during peak hours.

title: Email verification delay
description: Email verification messages are taking longer than expected to arrive. Users are unable to complete registration.

title: Dashboard slow performance
description: The dashboard is loading slowly and occasionally freezing. Performance issues noticed during data aggregation.

title: Export feature not working
description: Users cannot export reports in PDF format. The export button appears to be non-functional.

title: Mobile app crashes on startup
description: iOS users reporting that the app crashes immediately upon opening. Issue appears to be version-specific.

title: Two-factor authentication issue
description: Some users are having trouble entering the 2FA code. Codes appear to expire too quickly.

title: Search functionality returning no results
description: The search feature is not returning any results even for entries that definitely exist in the database.
